duplication_removed: Repository-first workflow references consolidated under Section 5.
Public disclosure rule referenced instead of repeated in multiple areas.
clarity_improved: Role boundaries clarified with consistent phrasing.
Source-of-truth hierarchy rewritten into a more scannable structure.
structure_improved: Reordered sections to follow logical workflow from policy → roles → execution → governance.

notes: This proposal does not alter architecture, scope, governance, or approval boundaries. All changes are structural or wording-only, preserving original meaning and intent.
